meta.name: BFNE-S Brief Fear of Negative Evaluation Scale
meta.fullName: Brief Fear of Negative Evaluation Scale - Straightforward Items
meta.description: The BFNE-S is an 8-item self-report scale measuring fear of negative evaluation, a core feature of social anxiety. It uses only the straightforward (non-reverse-scored) items from the original 12-item BFNE, which have demonstrated superior psychometric properties.
meta.author: Rodebaugh et al. (2004)
meta.reference: Rodebaugh TL, Woods CM, Thissen DM, Heimberg RG, Chambless DL, Rapee RM. More information from fewer questions: the factor structure and item properties of the original and Brief Fear of Negative Evaluation Scale. Psychol Assess. 2004;16(2):169-181.
meta.instruction: Read each of the following statements carefully and indicate how characteristic it is of you.

commonChoices.label: Not at all characteristic of me

questions.text: I worry about what other people will think of me even when I know it does not make any difference
I am frequently afraid of other people noticing my shortcomings
I am afraid that others will not approve of me
I am afraid that people will find fault with me
When I am talking to someone, I worry about what they may be thinking about me
I am usually worried about what kind of impression I make
Sometimes I think I am too concerned with what other people think of me
I often worry that I will say or do the wrong things

ranges.label: Low Fear of Negative Evaluation
ranges.description: Your fear of negative evaluation is low. You are generally not overly concerned about others judgments.
suggestions: Continue maintaining your healthy perspective on social evaluation
Your confidence in social situations is a strength

ranges.label: Moderate Fear of Negative Evaluation
ranges.description: You have a moderate level of concern about being negatively evaluated by others.
suggestions: Practice self-compassion when worrying about others opinions
Challenge negative thoughts about social evaluation
Consider whether your concerns are proportionate to the situation

ranges.label: High Fear of Negative Evaluation
ranges.description: You have a high level of fear of negative evaluation, which may be affecting your social functioning.
suggestions: Consider consulting a mental health professional
Cognitive behavioral therapy (CBT) can be very effective for social anxiety
Practice gradual exposure to feared social situations

ranges.label: Very High Fear of Negative Evaluation
ranges.description: Your fear of negative evaluation is very high and is likely significantly impacting your daily life and social interactions.
suggestions: Strongly recommended to seek professional help
Social anxiety is highly treatable with evidence-based therapies
Discuss both therapy and medication options with a professional
